The '''FX-8 medical droid''' was a [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] manufactured by [[Medtech Industries/Legends|Medtech Industries]] as part of the [[FX-series medical assistant droid/Legends|FX-series]] of medical assistant [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. Produced during the last decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], it was ultimately succeeded by the [[FX-9 surgical assistant/Legends|FX-9 model]].<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Droids" />

{{Droid-stub}}
